Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Checklist Completed

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed after the execution of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Checklist Completed following SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days

Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and activity Plagiarism Originality Report Completed for cases where activity Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurs

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection across all process variants containing this sequence

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days measured until the next non-system administrative step in the manuscript review workflow
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-EIC Reject in rejected submission variants

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time from SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that eventually reach reviewer agreement
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
